name: rayzam
title: Rayzam
description: Identify songs from your microphone with chosen recognition service, open them in your music apps and save searchable song history.
author: chizitere_david

commands.name: identify-song
commands.title: Identify Song
commands.description: Record audio and identify the currently playing song

preferences.name: service
preferences.title: Recognition Service
preferences.description: Which service to use for song recognition

data.title: AudD (Recommended for only real playback, 90-95% accuracy)
ACRCloud (Recommended for both playback and humming, 95%+ accuracy)

preferences.name: recordingDuration
preferences.title: Recording Duration
preferences.description: How many seconds to record audio (10–30)

preferences.name: enableDebugAudio
preferences.title: Save Debug Audio
preferences.description: Save a copy of each recording for troubleshooting audio capture issues
preferences.label: Save audio recordings

preferences.name: debugAudioDirectory
preferences.title: Saved Audio Directory
preferences.description: Folder where audio recordings are saved. If unavailable, Rayzam uses its Raycast support folder.

preferences.name: enableDebugJson
preferences.title: Save Debug JSON
preferences.description: Save the raw JSON returned by your selected recognition service for troubleshooting matches.
preferences.label: Save recognition JSON responses

preferences.name: debugJsonDirectory
preferences.title: Saved JSON Directory
preferences.description: Folder where raw recognition JSON responses are saved. If unavailable, Rayzam uses its Raycast support folder.

preferences.name: saveAlternativeMatches
preferences.title: Save Alternative Matches
preferences.description: Save other recognition candidates returned by the provider so they can be reviewed from Song History.
preferences.label: Save alternate recognition candidates

preferences.name: postMatchAction
preferences.title: Post-Match Action
preferences.description: What to do automatically after a song is identified

preferences.name: inputDevice
preferences.title: Audio Input Device
preferences.description: Leave blank to auto-detect. On Windows: paste the exact DirectShow name shown by running `ffmpeg -list_devices true -f dshow -i dummy` in a terminal (e.g. Microphone (Realtek Audio)). On macOS: paste the AVFoundation device index shown by `ffmpeg -f avfoundation -list_devices true -i ""`.

preferences.name: auddApiKey
preferences.title: AudD API Key
preferences.description: API token from audd.io, used when you choose AudD as the recognition service.

preferences.name: acrcloudAccessKey
preferences.title: ACRCloud Access Key
preferences.description: Access key from your ACRCloud Audio & Video Recognition project

preferences.name: acrcloudAccessSecret
preferences.title: ACRCloud Access Secret
preferences.description: Secret key from the same ACRCloud project as your access key

preferences.name: acrcloudHost
preferences.title: ACRCloud Host
preferences.description: Host from the same ACRCloud project as your access key and secret key.

preferences.name: acrcloudMetadataToken
preferences.title: ACRCloud Metadata API Token
preferences.description: Optional Bearer token from ACRCloud Developer Settings. Used to fetch artwork and richer platform metadata.

preferences.name: acrcloudMetadataHost
preferences.title: ACRCloud Metadata API Host
preferences.description: Optional ACRCloud Metadata API host. Leave empty to use eu-api-v2.acrcloud.com.
